# dglOpenGL

This repository may either commit `dglOpenGL.pas` directly or provide it from
this external dependency folder.

- Upstream: https://github.com/SaschaWillems/dglOpenGL
- License: Mozilla Public License 2.0
- Used by: OpenGL bindings across renderer, engine, GUI, and physics units
- Local path expected if not committed directly: `External/dglOpenGL/`

If `dglOpenGL.pas` is committed directly, keep its MPL 2.0 source header intact.
If you vendor the upstream package here, keep the upstream license file and
copyright notices.
